If one walked into my backyard and started poking me with a needle angrily, I’d rock their shit, too. “They’re just little animals living their life.” Me too, homie. I don’t care if I’m wearing Eau De Fightclub #7, you attack me, it’s on. I offer the same rule to all animals, big or small: You wanna hang out near me, cool. You enter my home or attack me, you die.
